scenarios.name: Arming highlights the source palette tool

steps.text: I arm the source placement tool
the palette tool Source should be active
the palette tool Sink should be inactive

scenarios.name: Arming highlights the sink palette tool

steps.text: I arm the sink placement tool
the palette tool Sink should be active
the palette tool Source should be inactive

scenarios.name: Placing a source resets the palette

steps.text: I arm the source placement tool
I place a source at <x> <y>
the diagram should contain source Source1
source Source1 should be at position 50 150
the source placement tool should be disarmed
no palette tool should be active

scenarios.name: Placing a sink resets the palette

steps.text: I arm the sink placement tool
I place a sink at <x> <y>
the diagram should contain sink Sink1
sink Sink1 should be at position 400 150
the sink placement tool should be disarmed
no palette tool should be active

scenarios.name: Switching palette tools moves cloud highlight

steps.text: I arm the source placement tool
I arm the sink placement tool
the palette tool Sink should be active
the palette tool Source should be inactive
